INCIDENT #1
Raven Alert: Multiple Gunshot Alert on 05/12/25 at 06:16PM at 2500 blk Sonoma Blvd.
Dispatch CFS:
25-4619: 05/12/25 at 06:17PM Raven alerted to multiple gunshots heard in the area of 2500 blk Sonoma Blvd. A
victim called and stated that a subject had shot at his vehicle, and he had been struck once in the stomach. One adult
victim was located with non-life-threatening injuries.
Original CFS was in the area of Broadway/ Tennessee St.

--- page 4 ---
Actual scene and RAVEN gunshot alert was in the 2500 blk of Sonoma Blvd.

24-10161: 10/06/24 � 1:36AM/ Corner of Capitol St. & Marin St.
